data.title: 170-year-old European bank now safeguards OKX institutional clients’ crypto after October’s crash; OKX Europe dismisses "Wild West" narrative.
data.description: The recent cryptocurrency market crash in October has revived concerns about its unpredictable nature often likened to the "Wild West." However, Erald Ghoos, from OKX Europe, argues that this stereotype is not accurate. He suggests that companies like OKX and Standard Chartered are working to bring stability to the industry amid the fluctuating market conditions.

data.title: Samsung partners with GRAIL to bring Galleri Multi-Cancer early detection test to Asia. $110M investment. Potential expansion to Japan, Singapore.
data.description: Samsung C&T and Samsung Electronics are set to jointly invest $110 million in GRAIL, pending fulfillment of closing conditions. This partnership aims to advance the commercialization of Galleri in South Korea, with potential expansions into Japan and Singapore. Additionally, Samsung Electronics and GRAIL will collaborate on further opportunities.
Bitcoin Bancorp completes FINRA process for name change to Bitcoin Bancorp with new trading symbol "BCBC".

data.title: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) to report Q3 2025 results on Oct. 23, 2025. Conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Phone: (877) 407-4018.
data.description: In New York, Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) has announced that they will unveil their third quarter 2025 results on October 23, 2025, before the market opening. A conference call and webcast for investors is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. To join the conference call, dial (877) 407-4018 for domestic calls or (201) 689-8471 for international calls. Participants will need to provide identification upon dialing in.

data.title: EXL's digital lending innovation awarded Winner in IDC FinTech Results program for point-of-sale financing.
data.description: A groundbreaking digital transformation project has been honored as the winner in the IDC FinTech Results program. This initiative has been acknowledged for its exceptional accomplishments in pioneering digital advancements. The program recognized the project's significant impact on the fintech sector and its exemplary outcomes in driving innovative change. The initiative stands out amidst competition and showcases remarkable success in harnessing technology for financial solutions. Its recognition in the IDC FinTech Results program highlights the project's leading position in the industry, emphasizing the positive influence it has had on digital transformation.
ECB's Dolenc: 2026 inflation shortfall may be less than thought.
Kering reports total shares & voting rights for October 2025 in monthly statement.
ECB's Dolenc: It is hard to find reasons for ECB rate change in next months.
IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: The risk we see is that we may see increasing productivity from AI, but it also causes more divergence between countries.
ECB's Dolenc: Next ECB move could be either hike or cut.

data.title: PacketWatch introduces Rapid Response Assurance service to enhance cybersecurity which eliminates traditional retainer frustrations.
data.description: PacketWatch, a prominent company specializing in packet-level network threat hunting, has revealed its latest innovation, Rapid Response Assurance (RRA), on October 16, 2025, in Phoenix. This new program aims to address the challenges associated with traditional cybersecurity retainers by taking a proactive stance to eliminate frustrations and align expectations better. By leveraging RRA, clients can expect a more efficient and effective cybersecurity solution.

data.title: Microban International, a leader in antimicrobial solutions, appoints Shermon McMillan as new president on Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, in Huntersville, North Carolina, Microban International, a leading company in antimicrobial and odor control solutions, revealed their selection of Shermon McMillan as the new president. McMillan, a highly experienced global executive known for successfully propelling growth at Fortune 500 companies, will now lead the company in its continued expansion efforts.

data.title: Stäubli Robotics introduces MTC-900, a plug-and-play machine tending solution for efficient and safe automation with integration via Euromap 67 standard.
data.description: A newly introduced machine tending cart is revolutionizing productivity and safety in manufacturing by effortlessly connecting with Injection Molding Machines (IMMs) through the Euromap 67 standard. This innovation by Stäubli Robotics in Duncan, South Carolina on October 16, 2025, provides manufacturers with a quick pathway to collaborative automation.

data.title: Culture Unloc'd wraps LOCnificent Fest 2025 in NYC celebrating Black joy and diaspora culture.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Culture Unloc'd, a cultural production studio located in Brooklyn, concluded its latest LOCnificent Fest event. This two-part experience celebrated Black joy, identity, and diaspora culture. The event was successful in highlighting these important themes and drew attention from a diverse audience.

data.title: Myseum receives patent allowance for secure digital privacy streaming technology, strengthens IP portfolio globally.
data.description: Myseum, Inc., based in New Brunswick, N.J., disclosed on October 16, 2025, that it has obtained a notice of allowance from the U.S Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) for application #18/487,726 named “Secure Web RTC Real Time Communications Service for Audio and Video Streaming Communications.” This patent enhances Myseum’s existing intellectual property collection and its position as a global frontrunner in cutting-edge digital privacy technology. Myseum, listed as MYSE on Nasdaq, is a privacy-focused social media and technology company.
